title: GameStop Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2024 Results
text: GameStop released official Q4 2024 earnings results on March 25, 2025. Net sales declined to $1.283 billion from $1.794 billion year-over-year. Net income improved to $131.3 million versus $63.1 million previously. Cash position strengthened significantly to $4.775 billion. The company completed divestiture of Italy and the wind-down of store operations in Germany. For the full fiscal year 2024, annual net sales fell to $3.823 billion from $5.273 billion. Despite lower revenue, full-year net income reached $131.3 million compared to $6.7 million in fiscal 2023. SG&A expenses decreased to $1.130 billion from $1.324 billion. Adjusted EBITDA for Q4 reached $96.5 million, up from $88.0 million. Adjusted EBITDA for full year came to $36.1 million, down from $64.7 million. Basic EPS was $0.33 for the year, versus $0.02 previously. The company raised $3.454 billion through at-the-market share offerings during fiscal 2024, substantially bolstering its balance sheet and liquidity position.
